//: Demo content + difficulty definitions for the Steam Next Fest build. Read by the desktop shell to drive area progression, puzzle list, and per-puzzle difficulty overrides. Each area's puzzleDate points at a curated reserved-date folder (curated/<id>/) holding one image per mode; see //curated.
//curve: Four-tier difficulty: Classroom -> School -> Outside -> Online (production daily). Each demo tier is ~1.5x the previous in piece count; the online daily is the implicit fourth tier (~100% of production) that demo owners graduate into via the lighthouse landmark on the world map. Sizes here are 25% / 50% / 75% of production hard, leaving the daily as the real challenge.
//status: Classroom diamond locked at 4000c/16p after timing (8:59 actual). Other classroom sizes locked from user-pace timing. School + Outside values are predicted from the 1.5x curve and PENDING TIMING verification with the eventual specialist artwork; expect to tweak after the next two rounds of timing data.
//curated: Areas now point at curated reserved-date ids (curated/<id>/). Each area was seeded with COPIES of its original daily images as placeholders (classroom<-2026-03-17, school<-2026-03-18, outside<-2026-03-19); bespoke finals replace them one MODE at a time. Done so far: school + outside diamond (painting). To replace a mode: drop <mode>.webp into curated/<id>/, run `node scripts/build-curated.mjs`. See curated/README.md.
